data.title: THE CULINARY INSTITUTE OF AMERICA ANNOUNCES NEW TRUSTEES
data.description: In Hyde Park, New York, on March 26, 2026, the Culinary Institute of America (CIA) announced the appointment of four experienced professionals to its Board of Trustees. These individuals bring diverse expertise in leadership, technology, franchising, hospitality solutions, and communications to the institution. The newly appointed trustees are set to contribute their knowledge and skills to further enhance the CIA's strategic direction and operations.

data.title: WeInfuse Launches InfuseTrack to Bring Real-Time Visibility, Control, and Compliance to Infusion Asset Management
data.description: A new software platform called InfuseTrack has been developed by WeInfuse to simplify facility, equipment, and license management for various healthcare facilities including infusion centers, specialty pharmacies, home infusion providers, and hospital outpatient departments. The platform aims to streamline operations and improve efficiency in these settings. The launch took place in Dallas on March 26, 2026.

data.title: BCE Management Proxy Circular Now Available
data.description: Today, BCE Inc. (TSX: BCE) (NYSE: BCE) disclosed that it has submitted its annual general shareholder meeting notice and management proxy circular for 2026. The circular features details regarding BCE's upcoming annual general meeting to be held on Thursday, May.

data.title: A Labor of Love Worth $58 Billion in Care: New AARP Report Highlights Urgent Need to Support NY Caregivers
data.description: Family caregivers in New York are dedicating significant time, wages, and personal well-being to their roles. Currently, around four million caregivers in the state are collectively offering 2.6 billion hours of care. These caregivers play a vital role in upholding the health and long-term care system, and without their support, the system would be at risk of collapsing.

data.title: NetActuate Expands Warsaw Presence with Enhanced POP, Connectivity, and Full Cloud Stack
data.description: A leading global infrastructure and network services provider, NetActuate, has revealed a major enhancement to its Warsaw Point of Presence (POP) on March 26, 2026. This move bolsters their presence in Europe, recognized as one of the fastest-expanding markets. Operating in over 45 markets worldwide, NetActuate's upgrade in Warsaw signifies a strategic development in their network services, showcasing their commitment to expanding and enhancing their reach.

data.title: These Analysts Boost Their Forecasts On Precigen Following Q4 Results
data.description: Precigen, Inc. (NASDAQ: PGEN) announced its fourth-quarter results, revealing a quarterly loss of 1 cent per share, surpassing the anticipated loss of 8 cents per share by analysts. Despite this positive news, the company reported quarterly sales of $4.565 million, falling short of the projected $8.286 million. Helen Sabzevari, PhD, President and CEO of Precigen, highlighted the milestone year of 2025 with the FDA approval and launch of PAPZIMEOS, signaling the company's shift from clinical-stage to commercial-stage operations and the commencement of commercial product revenues. She expressed confidence in the physician community's support for PAPZIMEOS as the preferred first-line treatment for adults. For further details, visit Benzinga.com.
